dashboard.title: Welcome to Officia MENA
dashboard.subtitle: Your smart office assistant for Middle East businesses

landing.headline: The intelligent office for your MENA business
landing.subhead: AI handles the routine. You approve ready invoices, reports, and VAT.
landing.trialNote: 14 days full access · no credit card
landing.whyText: Built for Middle East & North Africa companies — Arabic UI, RTL layout, and AED pricing.
landing.ctaText: Sign up free — 14 full days, then clear plans.
landing.featuresText: Accounting, invoicing, inventory, HR, and banking — with an AI assistant.
landing.capabilitiesText: No fake reviews. Here is what works in the product today.
landing.security2: Each company sees only its own data
landing.security4: Rate limits on OCR and AI requests
benefits: AI extraction from photos and PDFs
Secure login and company data isolation

capabilityItems.title: Invoices & VAT
capabilityItems.text: Issue invoices, keep VAT journals, and prepare reports ready for review.

capabilityItems.title: AI OCR
capabilityItems.text: Extract data from photos and text PDFs — with review before posting.

capabilityItems.title: Banking
capabilityItems.text: Import statements and match transactions to invoices and expenses.

capabilityItems.title: Security
capabilityItems.text: Protected login, isolated company spaces, and PostgreSQL — no overpromises.

featureItems.title: Chart of accounts and automated journals
featureItems.description: Journal entries, VAT books, balance sheet, and P&L — one flow.

featureItems.title: Automatic invoice reading
featureItems.description: PDF or photo → the assistant extracts vendor, amount, VAT and proposes the entry.

featureItems.title: Register, issue, and receive
featureItems.description: Products, barcodes, stock movements, and low-stock alerts.

featureItems.title: Payroll and leave
featureItems.description: Payroll calculation, leave, and exports for your team.

featureItems.title: Smart bank matching
featureItems.description: Import statements and match expenses to invoices with AI help.

featureItems.title: Sales and purchases
featureItems.description: Professional invoices for customers and suppliers with status tracking.

pricing.title: Simple, honest plans
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. Change plans anytime.
pricing.footer: All plans include SSL, automatic backups, and data privacy. Annual plans include 2 months free.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For larger teams and growing companies

accounting_firm.name: Practice
accounting_firm.description: For accounting firms with many clients
